title: AI's next bottleneck: Why even the best chips made in the U.S. take a round trip to Taiwan
summary_full: Nvidia has reserved the majority of TSMC’s most advanced packaging capacity. The lesser-known chipmaking step may become the next bottleneck for AI.
summary_public: Nvidia has reserved the majority of TSMC’s most advanced packaging capacity. The lesser-known chipmaking step may become the next bottleneck for AI.
